series_metadata.series_description: This includes supporting information including requests for certification forms, corrensponce, Quality Control Plans, Plant Quality Assurance Inspection reports, and verification/compliance testing reports. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS then CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in shared electronic database (Site Manager) permanently., Electronic: Permanent
